title: I built an AI dev harness that isn't allowed to trust itself
excerpt: Scope note (read first): this describes a system I built and operate to develop an unannounced game....
content_html:
Machine-checked proof and human-gated actions

Scope note (read first): this describes a system I built and operate to develop an unannounced game. The game's identity, mechanics, and assets are withheld, and so are the harness's tuned prompts, gate implementations, and internal failure specifics. What's shown here is the method and the evidence discipline — the transferable part.

Summary

Over about four months (spring–summer 2026) I built and operated, solo, an operator-supervised multi-agent development harness that builds a real, shipping product. Its defining property isn't speed — it's that nothing an agent produces closes without machine-checkable proof, and no irreversible action happens without a human. This is a case study of the system and the evidence trail it leaves.

The idea

LLM coding agents are fast and unreliable. The engineering problem isn't getting output — it's trusting it. So the harness is built around one rule: an agent's work is unverified until a gate proves it. Coordination is automated; consequences are gated. And it's built to ship, not to gold-plate: every gate exists so I can move fast without shipping something broken — verification in service of velocity, not instead of it.

Architecture (concept level)

  • A five-role loop: Strategy → Execution → Critic → Eval → Ops. Judgment roles (Strategy, Critic, Eval) run on stronger models; execution roles on cheaper ones — cost follows the difficulty of the decision, not a flat default.
  • A manager / orchestration layer. Above the execution agents sits one orchestration role that I direct — it plans each unit of work, routes it to the right role and model, and holds the system's state between steps. I designed the roles, the gates, and the routing; the harness runs them. I'm not outside the loop supervising a black box — I'm the system's judgment and authority, and the manager is the layer that extends that across many parallel agents.
  • A cold, independent critic gate. Before a consequential change closes, it's reviewed by a Critic running on a fresh, zero-context session — a different strong model with no memory of how the code was written — so it reviews the work itself, not the author's rationale for it. It can send the change back for rework. A self-review rubber-stamps; a cold critic catches what the author already talked themselves past.
  • A human-in-the-loop autonomy ladder: the loop's handoffs are automated — one role hands to the next without me — but every irreversible act (deploying a build to a device, committing to git) stays behind an explicit human approval. Automate coordination; never automate the irreversible.
  • A differential oracle for correctness: the core logic is implemented twice and the two versions are fuzzed against each other. Where they disagree, one is wrong — no gold labels required.

The evidence discipline (the differentiator)

Every closed unit of work leaves a durable, machine-checkable proof:

  • NO-PROOF-NO-CLOSE gate. A work item cannot close until an automated check confirms its proof exists on disk. The loop physically cannot skip it.
  • Provenance-bound proof. On-device validation screenshots are sanitized (sensitive regions blacked out), and provenance manifests bind images to the exact git SHA, screen dimensions, and redaction method that produced them — so an artifact traces back to the commit it proves.
  • Human-gated checkpoints. Each checkpoint records scoped git staging (explicit paths only), a commit/SHA trail across the repos it touches, an artifact-registry audit, and an explicit operator approval.
  • Periodic self-evaluation. An independent evaluation role produces a numeric health score with a delta versus the prior period and a failure taxonomy; regressions feed a failure registry that drives fixes.

The testing oracle

The product's core logic is held to property-based invariant tests — generated inputs are thrown at the engine and a set of invariants must hold for every one (e.g. a detector must agree with an independent full re-scan, and detection must be side-effect-free). The suite runs against the authoritative implementation, so an invariant is enforced on the logic, not asserted in prose (last run: zero failures). As a standalone, fully public demonstration of the same technique, my match3-engine repo carries 16 jqwik property invariants over random inputs.

Operating record (Apr–Jul 2026, from the on-disk archive)

~200 completed work-arcs · ~190 human-gated checkpoints · 74 independent critic reviews · 13 periodic self-evaluations · a growing failure registry with per-item root-cause fixes · a ~200-file sanitized proof archive with ~90 provenance manifests.

Verifiable outcomes (all public)

  • An arcade game — Tap Dodge Rush, under SeraphLight Studios — shipped end-to-end to Google Play.
  • A one-character bug fix merged upstream into TeaVM (the Java-to-JavaScript compiler), closing a long-dormant issue.
  • A live public model-drift board grading 16 LLMs daily on a frozen, deterministically-graded suite — no LLM-as-judge, so a score change is real.
  • Ten public repos, including a differential-oracle testing project and a Model Context Protocol server built from the spec.

What I'd bring to a team

Treat AI output as unverified until proven. Build the gate before the feature. Make failures loud, not silent. Keep a human on the irreversible path. The discipline transfers to any codebase — the harness just made me practice it a few hundred times.

Full architecture case study & repo: github.com/egnaro9/agentic-dev-harness · Portfolio: egnaro9.github.io

blocks.html_en: Scope note (read first): this describes a system I built and operate to develop an unannounced game. The game's identity, mechanics, and assets are withheld, and so are the harness's tuned prompts, gate implementations, and internal failure specifics. What's shown here is the method and the evidence discipline — the transferable part.

sentences.en: Scope note (read first): this describes a system I built and operate to develop an unannounced game.
sentences.zh: 范围说明（首先阅读）：这描述了我为开发一款未发布的游戏而构建和操作的系统。

sentences.en: The game's identity, mechanics, and assets are withheld, and so are the harness's tuned prompts, gate implementations, and internal failure specifics.
sentences.zh: 游戏的身份、机制和资产都被保留，安全带的调整提示、门实现和内部故障细节也是如此。

sentences.en: What's shown here is the method and the evidence discipline — the transferable part.
sentences.zh: 这里展示的是方法和证据规则——可转移的部分。

sentences.en: The game's identity, mechanics, and assets are withheld, and so are the harness's tuned prompts, gate implementations, and internal failure specifics.
sentences.zh: 游戏的身份、机制和资产都被保留，安全带的调整提示、门实现和内部故障细节也是如此。

sentences.en: What's shown here is the method and the evidence discipline — the transferable part.

blocks.html_en: Summary

sentences.en: Summary
sentences.zh: 概括

blocks.html_en: Over about four months (spring–summer 2026) I built and operated, solo, an operator-supervised multi-agent development harness that builds a real, shipping product. Its defining property isn't speed — it's that nothing an agent produces closes without machine-checkable proof, and no irreversible action happens without a human. This is a case study of the system and the evidence trail it leaves.

sentences.en: Over about four months (spring–summer 2026) I built and operated, solo, an operator-supervised multi-agent development harness that builds a real, shipping product.
sentences.zh: 在大约四个月的时间里（2026 年春夏），我单独构建并运营了一个由操作员监督的多代理开发工具，用于构建真实的运输产品。

sentences.en: Its defining property isn't speed — it's that nothing an agent produces closes without machine-checkable proof, and no irreversible action happens without a human.
sentences.zh: 它的定义属性不是速度——而是代理产生的任何结果都不会在没有机器可检查的证据的情况下关闭，并且在没有人类的情况下不会发生不可逆转的操作。

sentences.en: This is a case study of the system and the evidence trail it leaves.
sentences.zh: 这是该系统及其留下的证据线索的案例研究。

blocks.html_en: The idea

sentences.en: The idea
sentences.zh: 这个想法

blocks.html_en: LLM coding agents are fast and unreliable. The engineering problem isn't getting output — it's trusting it. So the harness is built around one rule: an agent's work is unverified until a gate proves it. Coordination is automated; consequences are gated. And it's built to ship, not to gold-plate: every gate exists so I can move fast without shipping something broken — verification in service of velocity, not instead of it.

sentences.en: LLM coding agents are fast and unreliable.
sentences.zh: LLM 编码代理快速且不可靠。

sentences.en: The engineering problem isn't getting output — it's trusting it.
sentences.zh: 工程问题不在于获得输出——而在于信任它。

sentences.en: So the harness is built around one rule: an agent's work is unverified until a gate proves it.
sentences.zh: 因此，该安全带是围绕一条规则构建的：在门证明之前，代理的工作未经验证。

sentences.en: Coordination is automated; consequences are gated.
sentences.zh: 协调是自动化的；后果是有门控的。

sentences.en: And it's built to ship, not to gold-plate: every gate exists so I can move fast without shipping something broken — verification in service of velocity, not instead of it.
sentences.zh: 它是为了运输而设计的，而不是为了镀金：每个大门的存在都是为了让我可以快速移动，而不会运输损坏的东西——验证是为了速度，而不是代替速度。

blocks.html_en: Architecture (concept level)

sentences.en: Architecture (concept level)
sentences.zh: 架构（概念级别）

blocks.html_en: • A five-role loop: Strategy → Execution → Critic → Eval → Ops. Judgment roles (Strategy, Critic, Eval) run on stronger models; execution roles on cheaper ones — cost follows the difficulty of the decision, not a flat default.

sentences.en: A five-role loop: Strategy → Execution → Critic → Eval → Ops.
sentences.zh: 五角色循环：策略→执行→批评→评估→操作。

sentences.en: Judgment roles (Strategy, Critic, Eval) run on stronger models; execution roles on cheaper ones — cost follows the difficulty of the decision, not a flat default.
sentences.zh: 判断角色（策略、批评、评估）运行在更强大的模型上；执行角色放在更便宜的角色上——成本取决于决策的难度，而不是简单的默认。

blocks.html_en: • A manager / orchestration layer. Above the execution agents sits one orchestration role that I direct — it plans each unit of work, routes it to the right role and model, and holds the system's state between steps. I designed the roles, the gates, and the routing; the harness runs them. I'm not outside the loop supervising a black box — I'm the system's judgment and authority, and the manager is the layer that extends that across many parallel agents.

sentences.en: A manager / orchestration layer.
sentences.zh: 管理器/编排层。

sentences.en: Above the execution agents sits one orchestration role that I direct — it plans each unit of work, routes it to the right role and model, and holds the system's state between steps.
sentences.zh: 在执行代理之上，有一个由我指导的编排角色——它规划每个工作单元，将其路由到正确的角色和模型，并在步骤之间保存系统的状态。

sentences.en: I designed the roles, the gates, and the routing; the harness runs them.
sentences.zh: 我设计了角色、大门和路线；安全带运行它们。

sentences.en: I'm not outside the loop supervising a black box — I'm the system's judgment and authority, and the manager is the layer that extends that across many parallel agents.
sentences.zh: 我并不是在监督黑匣子的循环之外——我是系统的判断和权威，而管理者是将其扩展到许多并行代理的层。

blocks.html_en: • A cold, independent critic gate. Before a consequential change closes, it's reviewed by a Critic running on a fresh, zero-context session — a different strong model with no memory of how the code was written — so it reviews the work itself, not the author's rationale for it. It can send the change back for rework. A self-review rubber-stamps; a cold critic catches what the author already talked themselves past.

sentences.en: A cold, independent critic gate.
sentences.zh: 冷酷、独立的评论家之门。

sentences.en: Before a consequential change closes, it's reviewed by a Critic running on a fresh, zero-context session — a different strong model with no memory of how the code was written — so it reviews the work itself, not the author's rationale for it.
sentences.zh: 在相应的更改结束之前，它会由在新的零上下文会话上运行的评论家进行审查——这是一个不同的强模型，不记得代码是如何编写的——因此它审查的是工作本身，而不是作者的基本原理。

sentences.en: It can send the change back for rework.
sentences.zh: 它可以将更改发回进行返工。

sentences.en: A self-review rubber-stamps; a cold critic catches what the author already talked themselves past.
sentences.zh: 自我审查橡皮图章；冷酷的批评家抓住了作者已经说过的话。

blocks.html_en: • A human-in-the-loop autonomy ladder: the loop's handoffs are automated — one role hands to the next without me — but every irreversible act (deploying a build to a device, committing to git) stays behind an explicit human approval. Automate coordination; never automate the irreversible.

sentences.en: A human-in-the-loop autonomy ladder: the loop's handoffs are automated — one role hands to the next without me — but every irreversible act (deploying a build to a device, committing to git) stays behind an explicit human approval.
sentences.zh: 人在环自治阶梯：环路的交接是自动化的——一个角色在没有我的情况下移交给下一个角色——但每一个不可逆转的行为（将构建部署到设备上，提交给 git）都需要经过明确的人类批准。

sentences.en: Automate coordination; never automate the irreversible.
sentences.zh: 自动化协调；永远不要将不可逆转的事情自动化。

blocks.html_en: • A differential oracle for correctness: the core logic is implemented twice and the two versions are fuzzed against each other. Where they disagree, one is wrong — no gold labels required.

sentences.en: A differential oracle for correctness: the core logic is implemented twice and the two versions are fuzzed against each other.
sentences.zh: 正确性的差异预言机：核心逻辑被实现两次，并且两个版本相互模糊。

sentences.en: Where they disagree, one is wrong — no gold labels required.
sentences.zh: 如果他们不同意，那就错了——不需要金标。

blocks.html_en: The evidence discipline (the differentiator)

sentences.en: The evidence discipline (the differentiator)
sentences.zh: 证据纪律（区分因素）

blocks.html_en: Every closed unit of work leaves a durable, machine-checkable proof:

sentences.en: Every closed unit of work leaves a durable, machine-checkable proof:
sentences.zh: 每个封闭的工作单元都会留下持久的、可机器检查的证明：

blocks.html_en: • NO-PROOF-NO-CLOSE gate. A work item cannot close until an automated check confirms its proof exists on disk. The loop physically cannot skip it.

sentences.en: NO-PROOF-NO-CLOSE gate.
sentences.zh: 无法证明无法关闭的门。

sentences.en: A work item cannot close until an automated check confirms its proof exists on disk.
sentences.zh: 在自动检查确认其证据存在于磁盘上之前，工作项无法关闭。

sentences.en: The loop physically cannot skip it.
sentences.zh: 循环实际上无法跳过它。

blocks.html_en: • Provenance-bound proof. On-device validation screenshots are sanitized (sensitive regions blacked out), and provenance manifests bind images to the exact git SHA, screen dimensions, and redaction method that produced them — so an artifact traces back to the commit it proves.

sentences.en: Provenance-bound proof.
sentences.zh: 出处证明。

sentences.en: On-device validation screenshots are sanitized (sensitive regions blacked out), and provenance manifests bind images to the exact git SHA, screen dimensions, and redaction method that produced them — so an artifact traces back to the commit it proves.
sentences.zh: 设备上的验证屏幕截图经过清理（敏感区域被涂黑），出处清单将图像绑定到生成它们的确切 git SHA、屏幕尺寸和编辑方法 - 因此工件可以追溯到它所证明的提交。

blocks.html_en: • Human-gated checkpoints. Each checkpoint records scoped git staging (explicit paths only), a commit/SHA trail across the repos it touches, an artifact-registry audit, and an explicit operator approval.

sentences.en: Human-gated checkpoints.
sentences.zh: 人工控制的检查站。

sentences.en: Each checkpoint records scoped git staging (explicit paths only), a commit/SHA trail across the repos it touches, an artifact-registry audit, and an explicit operator approval.
sentences.zh: 每个检查点都会记录范围内的 git staging（仅限显式路径）、它所涉及的存储库的提交/SHA 跟踪、工件注册表审核和显式操作员批准。

blocks.html_en: • Periodic self-evaluation. An independent evaluation role produces a numeric health score with a delta versus the prior period and a failure taxonomy; regressions feed a failure registry that drives fixes.

sentences.en: Periodic self-evaluation.
sentences.zh: 定期自我评估。

sentences.en: An independent evaluation role produces a numeric health score with a delta versus the prior period and a failure taxonomy; regressions feed a failure registry that drives fixes.
sentences.zh: 独立评估角色会生成数字健康评分，其中包含与前一时期相比的增量以及故障分类；回归提供了一个驱动修复的故障注册表。

blocks.html_en: The testing oracle

sentences.en: The testing oracle
sentences.zh: 测试预言机

blocks.html_en: The product's core logic is held to property-based invariant tests — generated inputs are thrown at the engine and a set of invariants must hold for every one (e.g. a detector must agree with an independent full re-scan, and detection must be side-effect-free). The suite runs against the authoritative implementation, so an invariant is enforced on the logic, not asserted in prose (last run: zero failures). As a standalone, fully public demonstration of the same technique, my match3-engine repo carries 16 jqwik property invariants over random inputs.

sentences.en: The product's core logic is held to property-based invariant tests — generated inputs are thrown at the engine and a set of invariants must hold for every one (e.g. a detector must agree with an independent full re-scan, and detection must be side-effect-free).
sentences.zh: 该产品的核心逻辑采用基于属性的不变式测试——生成的输入被扔到引擎中，并且每个输入都必须保持一组不变式（例如，检测器必须同意独立的完全重新扫描，并且检测必须无副作用）。

sentences.en: The suite runs against the authoritative implementation, so an invariant is enforced on the logic, not asserted in prose (last run: zero failures).
sentences.zh: 该套件针对权威实现运行，因此在逻辑上强制执行不变量，而不是在散文中断言（上次运行：零失败）。

sentences.en: As a standalone, fully public demonstration of the same technique, my match3-engine repo carries 16 jqwik property invariants over random inputs.
sentences.zh: 作为同一技术的独立、完全公开的演示，我的 match3 引擎存储库在随机输入上包含 16 个 jqwik 属性不变量。

blocks.html_en: Operating record (Apr–Jul 2026, from the on-disk archive)

sentences.en: Operating record (Apr–Jul 2026, from the on-disk archive)
sentences.zh: 操作记录（2026 年 4 月至 7 月，来自磁盘存档）

blocks.html_en: ~200 completed work-arcs · ~190 human-gated checkpoints · 74 independent critic reviews · 13 periodic self-evaluations · a growing failure registry with per-item root-cause fixes · a ~200-file sanitized proof archive with ~90 provenance manifests.

sentences.en: ~200 completed work-arcs · ~190 human-gated checkpoints · 74 independent critic reviews · 13 periodic self-evaluations · a growing failure registry with per-item root-cause fixes · a ~200-file sanitized proof archive with ~90 provenance manifests.
sentences.zh: 约 200 个已完成的工作弧 · 约 190 个人工控制的检查点 · 74 条独立评论家审查 · 13 次定期自我评估 · 不断增长的故障注册表，其中包含每个项目的根本原因修复 · 约 200 个文件的经过消毒的证明档案，其中包含约 90 个出处清单。

blocks.html_en: Verifiable outcomes (all public)

sentences.en: Verifiable outcomes (all public)
sentences.zh: 可验证的结果（所有公开）

blocks.html_en: • An arcade game — Tap Dodge Rush, under SeraphLight Studios — shipped end-to-end to Google Play.

sentences.en: An arcade game — Tap Dodge Rush, under SeraphLight Studios — shipped end-to-end to Google Play.
sentences.zh: SeraphLight Studios 旗下的街机游戏 Tap Dodge Rush 端对端发布到 Google Play。

blocks.html_en: • A one-character bug fix merged upstream into TeaVM (the Java-to-JavaScript compiler), closing a long-dormant issue.

sentences.en: A one-character bug fix merged upstream into TeaVM (the Java-to-JavaScript compiler), closing a long-dormant issue.
sentences.zh: 一项单字符错误修复已上游合并到 TeaVM（Java 到 JavaScript 编译器）中，解决了一个长期休眠的问题。

blocks.html_en: • A live public model-drift board grading 16 LLMs daily on a frozen, deterministically-graded suite — no LLM-as-judge, so a score change is real.

sentences.en: A live public model-drift board grading 16 LLMs daily on a frozen, deterministically-graded suite — no LLM-as-judge, so a score change is real.
sentences.zh: 一个实时的公共模型漂移委员会每天在一个冻结的、确定性评分的套件上对 16 个法学硕士进行评分——没有法学硕士作为评委，所以分数变化是真实的。

blocks.html_en: • Ten public repos, including a differential-oracle testing project and a Model Context Protocol server built from the spec.

sentences.en: Ten public repos, including a differential-oracle testing project and a Model Context Protocol server built from the spec.
sentences.zh: 十个公共存储库，包括一个差分预言机测试项目和一个根据规范构建的模型上下文协议服务器。

blocks.html_en: What I'd bring to a team

sentences.en: What I'd bring to a team
sentences.zh: 我会给团队带来什么

blocks.html_en: Treat AI output as unverified until proven. Build the gate before the feature. Make failures loud, not silent. Keep a human on the irreversible path. The discipline transfers to any codebase — the harness just made me practice it a few hundred times.

sentences.en: Treat AI output as unverified until proven.
sentences.zh: 在得到证实之前，将人工智能输出视为未经验证。

sentences.en: Build the gate before the feature.
sentences.zh: 在功能之前建造大门。

sentences.en: Make failures loud, not silent.
sentences.zh: 让失败大声起来，而不是沉默。

sentences.en: Keep a human on the irreversible path.
sentences.zh: 让人类走上不可逆转的道路。

sentences.en: The discipline transfers to any codebase — the harness just made me practice it a few hundred times.
sentences.zh: 该规则适用于任何代码库——该工具让我练习了数百次。

sentences.en: Full architecture case study & repo: github.com/egnaro9/agentic-dev-harness · Portfolio: egnaro9.github.io
sentences.zh: 完整的架构案例研究和存储库：github.com/egnaro9/agentic-dev-harness · 作品集：egnaro9.github.io

content_html_zh:
机器检查的证明和人工控制的操作

范围说明（首先阅读）：这描述了我为开发一款未发布的游戏而构建和操作的系统。 游戏的身份、机制和资产都被保留，安全带的调整提示、门实现和内部故障细节也是如此。 这里展示的是方法和证据规则——可转移的部分。

概括

在大约四个月的时间里（2026 年春夏），我单独构建并运营了一个由操作员监督的多代理开发工具，用于构建真实的运输产品。 它的定义属性不是速度——而是代理产生的任何结果都不会在没有机器可检查的证据的情况下关闭，并且在没有人类的情况下不会发生不可逆转的操作。 这是该系统及其留下的证据线索的案例研究。

这个想法

LLM 编码代理快速且不可靠。 工程问题不在于获得输出——而在于信任它。 因此，该安全带是围绕一条规则构建的：在门证明之前，代理的工作未经验证。 协调是自动化的；后果是有门控的。 它是为了运输而设计的，而不是为了镀金：每个大门的存在都是为了让我可以快速移动，而不会运输损坏的东西——验证是为了速度，而不是代替速度。

架构（概念级别）

  • 五角色循环：策略→执行→批评→评估→操作。 判断角色（策略、批评、评估）运行在更强大的模型上；执行角色放在更便宜的角色上——成本取决于决策的难度，而不是简单的默认。
  • 管理器/编排层。 在执行代理之上，有一个由我指导的编排角色——它规划每个工作单元，将其路由到正确的角色和模型，并在步骤之间保存系统的状态。 我设计了角色、大门和路线；安全带运行它们。 我并不是在监督黑匣子的循环之外——我是系统的判断和权威，而管理者是将其扩展到许多并行代理的层。
  • 冷酷、独立的评论家之门。 在相应的更改结束之前，它会由在新的零上下文会话上运行的评论家进行审查——这是一个不同的强模型，不记得代码是如何编写的——因此它审查的是工作本身，而不是作者的基本原理。 它可以将更改发回进行返工。 自我审查橡皮图章；冷酷的批评家抓住了作者已经说过的话。
  • 人在环自治阶梯：环路的交接是自动化的——一个角色在没有我的情况下移交给下一个角色——但每一个不可逆转的行为（将构建部署到设备上，提交给 git）都需要经过明确的人类批准。 自动化协调；永远不要将不可逆转的事情自动化。
  • 正确性的差异预言机：核心逻辑被实现两次，并且两个版本相互模糊。 如果他们不同意，那就错了——不需要金标。

证据纪律（区分因素）

每个封闭的工作单元都会留下持久的、可机器检查的证明：

  • 无法证明无法关闭的门。 在自动检查确认其证据存在于磁盘上之前，工作项无法关闭。 循环实际上无法跳过它。
  • 出处证明。 设备上的验证屏幕截图经过清理（敏感区域被涂黑），出处清单将图像绑定到生成它们的确切 git SHA、屏幕尺寸和编辑方法 - 因此工件可以追溯到它所证明的提交。
  • 人工控制的检查站。 每个检查点都会记录范围内的 git staging（仅限显式路径）、它所涉及的存储库的提交/SHA 跟踪、工件注册表审核和显式操作员批准。
  • 定期自我评估。 独立评估角色会生成数字健康评分，其中包含与前一时期相比的增量以及故障分类；回归提供了一个驱动修复的故障注册表。

测试预言机

该产品的核心逻辑采用基于属性的不变式测试——生成的输入被扔到引擎中，并且每个输入都必须保持一组不变式（例如，检测器必须同意独立的完全重新扫描，并且检测必须无副作用）。 该套件针对权威实现运行，因此在逻辑上强制执行不变量，而不是在散文中断言（上次运行：零失败）。 作为同一技术的独立、完全公开的演示，我的 match3 引擎存储库在随机输入上包含 16 个 jqwik 属性不变量。

操作记录（2026 年 4 月至 7 月，来自磁盘存档）

约 200 个已完成的工作弧 · 约 190 个人工控制的检查点 · 74 条独立评论家审查 · 13 次定期自我评估 · 不断增长的故障注册表，其中包含每个项目的根本原因修复 · 约 200 个文件的经过消毒的证明档案，其中包含约 90 个出处清单。

可验证的结果（所有公开）

  • SeraphLight Studios 旗下的街机游戏 Tap Dodge Rush 端对端发布到 Google Play。
  • 一项单字符错误修复已上游合并到 TeaVM（Java 到 JavaScript 编译器）中，解决了一个长期休眠的问题。
  • 一个实时的公共模型漂移委员会每天在一个冻结的、确定性评分的套件上对 16 个法学硕士进行评分——没有法学硕士作为评委，所以分数变化是真实的。
  • 十个公共存储库，包括一个差分预言机测试项目和一个根据规范构建的模型上下文协议服务器。

我会给团队带来什么

在得到证实之前，将人工智能输出视为未经验证。 在功能之前建造大门。 让失败大声起来，而不是沉默。 让人类走上不可逆转的道路。 该规则适用于任何代码库——该工具让我练习了数百次。

完整的架构案例研究和存储库：github.com/egnaro9/agentic-dev-harness · 作品集：egnaro9.github.io
